itinerary.title: Arrival in Rishikesh and Evening Ganga Aarti
itinerary.description: Meet our team in Delhi or Dehradun and transfer to your hotel in Rishikesh. After checking in and relaxing, head to the busy Triveni Ghat in the evening to attend the beautiful Ganga Aarti prayer ceremony by the river.

itinerary.title: Guided Spiritual and Ashram Tour
itinerary.description: Visit the peaceful Parmarth Niketan Ashram and explore the historic Beatles Ashram, famous for its wall art and meditation halls. You can optionally join a local yoga or meditation session at the ashram.

itinerary.title: White Water River Rafting and Suspension Bridges
itinerary.description: Experience the thrill of river rafting on the Ganges in the morning. Later in the afternoon, walk across the famous Ram Jhula and Laxman Jhula suspension bridges and enjoy the local cafes.

itinerary.title: Bungee Jumping and Neelkanth Mahadev Temple
itinerary.description: Head to Jumpin Heights to try bungee jumping. Afterwards, take a scenic drive to the historic Neelkanth Mahadev Temple, located in the hills outside Rishikesh, and enjoy the forest views.

itinerary.title: Trek to Neer Garh Waterfall
itinerary.description: Take a refreshing morning walk up to the beautiful Neer Garh Waterfall. Swim in the natural pools and take photographs, and spend your evening relaxing on the sandy riverbanks of the Ganges.

itinerary.title: Local Markets and Vegetarian Food Tasting
itinerary.description: Spend your day shopping for spiritual handicrafts, beads, and organic items in the local markets. Sample the traditional vegetarian dishes of Rishikesh and enjoy a final walk by the river.

itinerary.title: Rishikesh to Delhi or Dehradun Departure
itinerary.description: Start your morning with a relaxing yoga session. After breakfast, check out of your hotel and drive back to Delhi or Dehradun for your return journey.

title: Rishikesh Spiritual & Adventure
description: Experience the perfect mix of adventure and peace on this 7-day Rishikesh tour. Go river rafting, try bungee jumping, hike to waterfalls, visit historic ashrams, and attend the beautiful evening Ganga Aarti.
highlights: Attend the daily evening Ganga Aarti ceremony at Triveni Ghat
Explore the historic Beatles Ashram and Parmarth Niketan
Enjoy white-water river rafting and suspension bridge walks
Hike up to the beautiful natural pools of Neer Garh Waterfall
